items.title: Clearer shared list avatars
items.description: List cards now show the other people on a shared list instead of showing your own avatar or initials.

items.title: Shared list member avatars
items.description: Shared lists now show member avatars on the list card, making it easier to recognize who has access at a glance.

items.title: Safer account cleanup
items.description: Account deletion handling is more careful about preserving local data when sign-in confirmation is needed.

items.title: Fixed Play crash diagnostics upload
items.description: Release uploads now send the native debug symbols expected by Google Play.

items.title: Improved Play Store diagnostics
items.description: Release uploads now include debug symbols to help diagnose crashes more effectively.

items.title: Fixed Play Store release notes
items.description: Release notes now use the correct Play Store language so update details appear as expected.

items.title: Fixed empty release notes
items.description: Release notes now appear correctly in the Google Play Store when new versions are uploaded.

items.title: Reliable Play Store uploads
items.description: Fixed an issue that could prevent new releases from reaching the Google Play Console. Updates should now arrive more reliably.

items.title: Automated Play Store uploads
items.description: Release builds are now automatically uploaded to the Google Play Console internal track, bringing updates faster.

items.title: Faster Play Store updates
items.description: New releases are now automatically uploaded to the Google Play Store, so updates arrive sooner after release.

items.title: What's New test update
items.description: This small follow-up release helps you verify the new What's New experience after updating from the previous version.

items.title: Smarter What's New updates
items.description: Updates can now show curated highlights for the versions you skipped, so it is easier to catch up after installing a new release.

items.title: More reliable synced lists
items.description: List updates are safer when connection issues or cloud errors happen.

items.title: Cleaner sharing and members
items.description: Sharing lists and managing members is more predictable.

items.title: Easier account cleanup
items.description: You can now find account deletion requests from Profile > About.
